advance_meaning: VALIDATION_ADVANCE_REQUEST authorizes a REQUEST for separate OOS authorization; it does NOT open OOS and does NOT evaluate any OOS gate
advancement_conditions_exclude_diagnosti: PBO, concentration, and directional-coherence are DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY: reported but cannot independently change the validation advancement verdict; no discretionary red-flag test may be introduced after validation is observed
config_A_C_treatment: the parameter-stability gate (A and C both net-profitable) is a VALIDATION gate; A and C are neighboring robustness configs and NEVER substitute for B in the OOS run

dsr_dispersion_treatment.rng001_rng_entrylogic: retained in N=5; EXCLUDED from dispersion
dsr_dispersion_treatment.source: validation-period annualized net Sharpes of A, B, C; sample std ddof=1; /sqrt(252)

oos_authorization_request_conditions: Configs A and C both net-profitable
purpose: freezes the validation-stage advancement rule SEPARATELY from the sealed-OOS primary gates; validation does NOT evaluate net_oos_sharpe, the OOS bootstrap gate, or OOS DSR

validation_diagnostics_reported_not_gati.annual_herfindahl: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY; reported, NEVER changes the advance verdict
validation_diagnostics_reported_not_gati.directional_coherence_A_B_C: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY; reported, NEVER changes the advance verdict
validation_diagnostics_reported_not_gati.dsr_trial_dispersion_validation: validation annualized net Sharpes of A/B/C; frozen input to the OOS DSR; NOT a validation pass/fail
validation_diagnostics_reported_not_gati.pbo_cscv: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY (config-B per-fold); reported, NEVER changes the advance verdict
validation_diagnostics_reported_not_gati.positive_pnl_regime_concentration: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY; reported, NEVER changes the advance verdict
validation_diagnostics_reported_not_gati.single_year_sector_side_issuer_concentra: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY; reported, NEVER changes the advance verdict (no post-hoc red-flag test introduced after validation is observed)

parameter_stability_A_and_C_net_profitab.rule: Configs A and C both net-profitable
